home_ingredients_snippet.heading: What's in every bar
home_ingredients_snippet.body: Every bar shares the same base: coconut oil and shea butter, saponified with lye and scented with essential oils. The lye reacts away with the oils as the soap cures, so no active lye is left in the finished bar. Curious about the details or the allergen note?

home_cta_strip.heading: No cart, no checkout, just email or call
home_cta_strip.subheading: Tell Jelisha the scents and how many you'd like, and she'll set up a local pickup in Johnson County, Texas.

shop_hero.subheadline: Five small-batch scents, the same gentle coconut oil and shea butter base, different essential oils. There's no cart here. You reserve your scents by emailing or calling Jelisha for local pickup.

shop_pricing.heading: $4 per bar, or 3 for $10
shop_pricing.subheading: Mix and match scents. The price is the same across all five. No tiers, no packages, no hidden 'contact for price.'

shop_cta_strip.heading: Found your three?

ingredients_hero.headline: What's in every bar
ingredients_hero.subheadline: Exactly what the soap is made of, in plain language, plus an honest word about lye and essential-oil sensitivities. No medical claims, no fine print.

ingredients_base.heading: One simple base, five scents
ingredients_base.body:
Every bar is made from the same base: coconut oil and shea butter, saponified with lye (sodium hydroxide), then scented with essential oils. That's the whole recipe, only the essential oils change from scent to scent.

Lye does the work that turns oils into soap. During saponification it reacts completely with the coconut oil and shea butter, and once the bars are cured, no active lye remains in the finished soap. That's how all traditional handmade bar soap is made.

ingredients_allergens.heading: A word on allergens
ingredients_allergens.body: Every bar is scented with essential oils, and essential oils are a common sensitivity for some people. If you have a known fragrance or essential-oil allergy, reach out to Jelisha before you order and she'll talk you through the scents so you can pick one that works for you.

items.question: Is there still lye in the finished soap?
items.answer: No active lye remains. The lye reacts completely with the coconut oil and shea butter during saponification, and after the bars cure there's no active lye left in the finished soap.

items.question: What is the soap made of?
items.answer: Coconut oil and shea butter, saponified with lye (sodium hydroxide), and scented with essential oils. Every bar shares that same base.

items.question: How much does a bar cost?
items.answer: $4 per bar, or 3 for $10. Mix and match any of the five scents.

items.question: How do I order?
items.answer: Email or call Jelisha with the scents and quantity you want. She confirms availability and your total, then you arrange a pickup time and place. See the Contact page for the steps.

items.question: Do you ship?
items.answer: No, local pickup only in Johnson County, Texas. There's no shipping and no online checkout.

ingredients_cta_strip.heading: Still have an ingredient or allergy question?
ingredients_cta_strip.subheading: Email Jelisha before you order and she'll answer honestly. Local pickup in Johnson County, Texas, no shipping.

contact_hero.headline: Order for local pickup
contact_hero.subheadline: Ordering here is direct and personal. Email or call Jelisha, tell her the scents you want, and arrange a pickup. No cart, no checkout, no rush.

contact_methods.heading: Reach Jelisha
contact_methods.body: Email is the easiest way to start an order, and it lands with a 'Soap order' subject so Jelisha can sort it quickly. Phone is on the way; the number below is a placeholder until it's added.

steps.title: Tell Jelisha what you want
steps.description: Email or call with the scent(s) and how many bars you'd like. Remember, 3 for $10.

steps.title: She confirms it's ready
steps.description: Jelisha checks availability and gives you the total. Nothing's locked in until you both agree.

steps.title: Arrange your pickup
steps.description: You settle on a time and place for local pickup in Johnson County, Texas. That's it.

contact_service_area.heading: Where to pick up
contact_service_area.body: Raw Soaps and Suds is local pickup and in-person only in Johnson County, Texas, including nearby towns like Cleburne and Burleson. There's no shipping, and no street address is published; you'll arrange the exact pickup time and place with Jelisha when you order.

contact_cta_strip.heading: Ready to order?
contact_cta_strip.subheading: Email or call Jelisha to place your local-pickup order. She'll take it from there.
contact_cta_strip.button: Email or call Jelisha to order

404.heading: That page slipped down the drain
404.body: The page you're after isn't here, but the soaps still are. Head back home or go straight to the five scents.
